LanguageData.AtePreferredFood.label: ate preferred food
LanguageData.AtePreferredFood.stages.0.label: ate preferred food
LanguageData.AtePreferredFood.stages.0.description: Ate a favorite type of food.
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceSatisfied.label: finally ate what I wanted
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceSatisfied.stages.0.label: finally ate what I wanted!
LanguageData.PFP_PreferenceSatisfied.stages.0.descrip: Finally! That's exactly what I wanted to eat.
LanguageData.AteNonPreferredFood.label: ate non-preferred food
LanguageData.AteNonPreferredFood.stages.0.label: ate non-preferred food
LanguageData.AteNonPreferredFood.stages.0.description: Ate a disliked type of food.
LanguageData.PFP_NoRecentPreferredFood.label: dietary fatigue
LanguageData.PFP_NoRecentPreferredFood.stages.0.label: taste fatigue
LanguageData.PFP_NoRecentPreferredFood.stages.0.descr: Every day it's the same thing... I can't even remember the last time I ate food I liked.
LanguageData.PFP_NoRecentPreferredFood.stages.1.label: dietary aversion
LanguageData.PFP_NoRecentPreferredFood.stages.1.descr: This again! Can't we grow something else?
